name: meditations
description: Marcus Aurelius's Meditations — a Stoic philosophy toolkit for mastering the mind, managing emotions, facing adversity with dignity, and leading with wisdom
useCase: Apply Stoic principles to daily life: the dichotomy of control, emotional management through judgement, facing adversity, leading with virtue, and building a disciplined mind
knownRisks: Stoicism is sometimes misused to suppress healthy emotions rather than process them
Marcus's philosophy was shaped by his unique position as Roman emperor — not all advice applies universally
The Meditations is a personal journal, not a systematic philosophy textbook — requires interpretation
